overview.calendar_subtitle: Each cell is one day; brighter means more reading.
overview.empty: No reading data yet. Sync a KOReader device via WebDAV to populate stats.
overview.unavailable_body: The stats endpoints are not enabled on this server, or no KOReader data has been ingested yet. Sync a device via WebDAV to start collecting reading sessions.

books.heading: Books read
books.subtitle: Sorted by total time.
books.unmatched_subtitle: Books KOReader saw but Shelf could not match by file hash.

book_detail.sessions_subtitle: Each bar is one continuous reading window.
